conflict: The truth, encountered accidentally and understood instantly
consequence: Nora knows everything — the power dynamic between the two women inverts completely
must_land_beats: Simone leaves to pick up food — Nora opens the laptop — the OpenClaw dashboard
Nora sees the conversation log, the sentiment analysis, the prompt engineering notes, the financial tracking
She sees her own intimate messages and photo reflected as data in an interface
She closes the laptop exactly as she found it and eats the Thai food and laughs at the right moments
She does not cry until she is alone in her apartment with the door locked
pressure_source: The truth, encountered accidentally and understood instantly
state_shift: Nora knows everything — the power dynamic between the two women inverts completely
